sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Valley Wealth Sells $11 Million of Invesco KBW Bank ETF
feed.summary: Valley Wealth Managers, Inc. sold 134,355 shares of the Invesco KBW Bank ETF (KBWB) for an estimated $10.6 million in the fourth quarter of 2025. This move reduced their KBWB stake to 0.9% of their 13F AUM, reflecting potential concerns about the growth outlook for banks due to anticipated interest rate cuts in 2026. Despite KBWB outperforming the S&P 500 in the past year, lower interest rates are expected to pressure bank net interest margins.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics Q4 2026 Earnings Results
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, exceeding analyst expectations for earnings and demonstrating steady revenue growth. The company attributed its performance to a robust subscription-based business model, strategic pricing initiatives, and ongoing investments in data, technology, and AI-driven solutions. Verisk expects continued growth driven by recurring revenue, pricing improvements, and expansion of its analytics and technology offerings.

feed.title: RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX) Announces $0.68 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: RTX Corporation has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.68 per share, payable on March 19th to shareholders of record on February 20th, resulting in an annualized dividend of $2.72 and a 1.3% yield. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 40.6% and analysts projecting a future payout ratio of 39.8%. The company recently reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and provided solid FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Travelers (TRV) Unveils AIClaim Assistant to Enhance Claims Proc
feed.summary: Travelers (TRV) has launched its new AIClaim Assistant, powered by OpenAI technology, to streamline auto damage claims via an intelligent voice service. The company, a significant player in the property and casualty insurance industry with a market cap of $64.7 billion, plans to expand this AI tool to other business areas. While Travelers shows strong financial health and stable market position, insider selling activity warrants attention from investors.

feed.title: Rothschild & Co Redburn Adjusts Halliburton Price Target to $40 From $35, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has increased its price target for Halliburton Company (HAL) to $40 from $35, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the oil-related services provider. The report was published on February 18, 2026, at 09:47 am EST.

feed.title: Humana commits $1.7 million to Illinois healthcare initiatives
feed.summary: Humana Inc. has announced over $1.7 million in new investments for Illinois healthcare initiatives, focusing on housing stability, workforce development, healthcare disparities, and access to maternal and behavioral healthcare services. This expands on previous grants, bringing their total commitment to over $3

feed.title: Eastman Chemical (EMN) Analyst Rating Update: Evercore ISI Raises Price Target | EMN Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has maintained its "In-Line" rating for Eastman Chemical (EMN) and increased its price target from $70.00 to $75.00. This adjustment reflects a 7.14% increase and follows several other optimistic adjustments by leading analysts in early February 2026. Despite a recent downgrade by RBC Capital, the consensus among 18 brokerage firms indicates an "Outperform" status for EMN, with an average target price of $76.06.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Raises Price Target for Ecolab (ECL) to $312 | ECL Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has raised its price target for Ecolab (ECL) to $312, maintaining an "Outperform" rating. This adjustment reflects a 4% increase from the previous target and mirrors similar upward revisions from other analysts like BMO Capital, Exane BNP Paribas, Wells Fargo, Stifel, and Citigroup, indicating a generally positive sentiment towards Ecolab. The average one-year price target from 20 analysts is $322.67, suggesting a 6.21% upside from the current price, though GuruFocus's GF Value estimate suggests a potential downside.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies stock hits all-time high at 262.55 USD
feed.summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corp (Wabtec) has reached an all-time high stock price of $262.55, marking a 34.75% increase over the past year. This surge is attributed to strong investor confidence and solid financial results in Q4 2025, with earnings and revenue surpassing analyst expectations. Stephens has raised its price target for Wabtec to $290, maintaining an Overweight rating.

feed.title: Parsons subsidiary SealingTech awarded $500 million cyber defense contract
feed.summary: Parsons Corporation's subsidiary, Sealing Technologies (SealingTech), has been awarded a $500 million sole-source contract by the United States Cyber Command (USCYBERCOM) for its Joint Cyber Hunt Kit solution. This three-year contract represents new business for Parsons, a company whose stock has declined by nearly 23% in the past six months and recently missed its Q4 2025 earnings expectations. The award underscores SealingTech's long-standing collaboration with the Department of War's Defense Innovation Unit and USCYBERCOM to develop advanced defensive cyber technologies, despite recent financial challenges faced by the parent company.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on General Mills to $42 From $46, Maintains Underweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has lowered its price target for General Mills (GIS) from $46 to $42 while maintaining an "Underweight" rating. This adjustment reflects a more cautious outlook on the food processing company's stock. The news article also highlights similar price target adjustments from other major financial institutions.

feed.title: L3Harris Is Up 28% in the Last 6 Months. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) has seen its stock climb 28% in the last six months, trading near its 52-week high, driven by strong Q4 results, a record backlog, and solid 2026 guidance. The company projects revenue of $23.0 billion to $23.5 billion for 2026, with an implied upside of 16% to a target price of $402 based on valuation models. Key factors supporting this growth include sustained defense spending, major contract awards, and plans for an IPO of its Missile Solutions business in H2 2026.

feed.title: How Ralph Lauren and Microsoft are shaping luxury retail’s next era
feed.summary: Ralph Lauren and Microsoft have maintained a 25-year partnership that has significantly shaped luxury retail's integration with the digital world. Their collaboration, highlighted at NRF 2026: Retail’s Big Show, focuses on blending storytelling with commerce to enhance customer experience, exemplified by their new AI-powered conversational shopping tool, "Ask Ralph." This innovation aims to foster deeper customer connection and internal collaboration within Ralph Lauren.

feed.title: Moderna dealt blows in ongoing patent dispute with Arbutus
feed.summary: Moderna has faced setbacks in its ongoing patent dispute with Arbutus Biopharma concerning its mRNA COVID-19 vaccine. A federal judge in Delaware dismissed two key defenses presented by Moderna, specifically rejecting their argument based on obviousness. This decision could impact the direction of the patent litigation between the two companies.

feed.title: 2026 Honda Civic Hybrid Wins Edmunds Top Rated 2026 Award
feed.summary: The 2026 Honda Civic Hybrid has received the Edmunds Top Rated Car Award for 2026, marking the fourth time the 11th-generation Civic has earned this distinction. Edmunds recognized the hybrid for its sporty design, safety performance, driving dynamics, and value. The vehicle features Honda's fourth-generation two-motor hybrid-electric powertrain, emphasizing fuel-efficiency without sacrificing performance or space.

feed.title: XME Rode Gold to a Near Double, Now Freeport’s Q2 Restart Will Test the Rally
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P Metals & Mining ETF (XME) has nearly doubled in the past year, driven by surging gold prices and increasing copper demand. While Newmont has seen significant free cash flow from high gold prices, Freeport-McMoRan's planned Q2 2026 restart of its Grasberg mine will be a critical test for the ETF's future performance, which also hinges on commodity price stability and production execution by its top holdings.

feed.title: Palo Alto shares sink 8%, CEO defends cybersecurity's position as AI hits software stocks
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks' shares dropped 8% after its fiscal second-quarter results, despite beating Wall Street estimates on revenue, due to lower-than-expected third-quarter earnings guidance. CEO Nikesh Arora defended cybersecurity from the perceived threat of AI, arguing that AI will enhance security rather than make it obsolete. The company has made significant investments in AI, including recent acquisitions, to adapt to the evolving cybersecurity landscape.

feed.title: Better Results Lifted FedEx Corporation's (FDX) Performance in Q4
feed.summary: FedEx Corporation (FDX) was a top performer in Q4 2025, according to The London Company Large Cap Strategy investor letter. The company's strong results were attributed to improved revenue quality, disciplined pricing, and continued cost savings, even amidst a freight recession. Despite this, FedEx is not among the 30 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds, and some investors believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside and less risk.

feed.title: On Semiconductor stock hits 52-week high at $73.67
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation's stock reached a new 52-week high of $73.67, driven by strong market performance with a 38.52% appreciation over the last year. Despite the achievement, the stock is considered overbought with a high P/E ratio of 248.24, trading slightly above its InvestingPro Fair Value. Recent financial reports showed a sequential decline in revenue but strength in automotive and industrial segments, leading to varied analyst ratings.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser switching most of its Goshen log trucks to natural gas
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser is transitioning most of its log truck fleet at its Goshen, Oregon facility to run on compressed natural gas (CNG), moving away from traditional diesel. The company has already converted 10 of its 70 trucks and plans to switch 10 trucks annually over the next five years. This initiative positions Weyerhaeuser as an early adopter of alternative fuel technology, using natural gas sourced from manure which is considered to have a certified negative carbon intensity.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group: Dividend Steady, Growth Slowing – What Now for Investors?
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group has outlined its growth and dividend strategy, maintaining a steady dividend with mid-single-digit EPS growth, though the stock currently underperforms the S&P 500. Investors are now weighing the dependable 3%+ yield against slower growth, rich valuation, and the impact of interest rates and regulation. The article advises investors to consider their portfolio needs, outlook on interest rates, regulatory risk tolerance, and the yield premium when evaluating WEC.

feed.title: Medtronic Analysts Cut Their Forecasts After Q3 Earnings
feed.summary: Medtronic (NYSE: MDT) reported better-than-expected Q3 earnings and sales, with adjusted EPS of $1.36 and sales of $9.017 billion. Despite affirming its FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance, analysts from Needham and Baird lowered their price targets on the stock. The company's CFO highlighted continued investment in R&D, growth opportunities, and M&A activities.

feed.title: EQT Plans Clarington Connector Pipeline, Compression Projects as Gas Prices Lift Q4 Profit
feed.summary: EQT Corp announced plans for infrastructure investments, including the Clarington Connector pipeline, and raised its natural gas production outlook. This comes after the company's fourth-quarter profit was boosted by higher natural gas prices and increased demand, particularly from data centers and LNG exports, leading to adjusted profit beating Wall Street estimates. EQT also provided forecasts for current-year production and capital expenditure.

feed.title: John Deere Selects 2026 Startup Innovators
feed.summary: Deere & Company has announced the five startups selected for its 2026 Startup Collaborator Program, an initiative designed to foster partnerships with emerging tech firms to advance precision agriculture solutions. These startups, including AIRS ML, IoTag, resonAg, TorqueAGI, and Aerobotics, offer diverse technologies ranging from AI-driven sensing and real-time monitoring to robotics and digital crop intelligence. The program aims to accelerate the development of practical innovations that enhance equipment performance, efficiency, and sustainability for customers in agriculture, construction, and roadbuilding.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (MFA) MFA Financial, Inc. Reports Q4 Net Interest Income $55.5M, vs. FactSet Est of $64.3M
feed.summary: MFA Financial, Inc. reported its Q4 net interest income at $55.5 million, falling short of FactSet's estimate of $64.3 million. The company's Q4 non-GAAP earnings also fell, despite a rise in net interest income. MFA Financial is a specialized REIT investing in residential mortgage loans and securities.

feed.title: 5 Top-Ranked Retail Apparel and Shoe Stocks for a Stable Portfolio
feed.summary: The Retail – Apparel and Shoes industry is performing stably in 2026, driven by value-conscious consumers and fast-moving trends. This article highlights five top-ranked stocks with a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) that are recommended for a stable portfolio: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (DECK), On Holding AG (ONON), Tapestry Inc. (TPR), American Eagle Outfitters Inc. (AEO), and FIGS Inc. (FIGS). Each company's recent performance, growth drivers, and financial outlook are discussed.

feed.title: TRACTOR SUPPLY ANNOUNCES A FLOCK OF ANIMAL-FRIENDLY FESTIVITIES LAUNCHING THIS MONTH
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company is launching a series of animal-focused events in February, including their annual Chick Days and the new Animal Days. These events offer savings, supplies, adoptions, and in-store activities for pet parents and animal owners, culminating in a nationwide "Farm Bash" celebration on February 21st. The aim is to celebrate the role animals play in "Life Out Here" and provide resources for their care.

feed.title: How CVS Health is supporting heart health through prevention and chronic management
feed.summary: CVS Health is addressing heart disease, the leading cause of death in the U.S., through a multi-faceted approach focusing on prevention, early detection, and chronic management. Their services include convenient preventive screenings, personalized weight loss and lifestyle support, and specialized care coordination through MinuteClinic, Oak Street Health, and Signify Health. The company aims to make heart health initiatives more accessible to Americans.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz appoints ex-Kellanova executive Nicolas Amaya to lead North America business
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz has appointed Nicolas Amaya, a former Kellanova executive, as president of its North America business. This move comes a week after the company put its plans to split into two entities on hold due to persistent demand weakness in the U.S. Amaya will oversee strategy, operations, and performance in Kraft Heinz's largest revenue-generating market, effective February 23.

feed.title: News | AJ Capital seeks $90 million Cambridge Graduate Hotel sale
feed.summary: AJ Capital Partners is looking to sell its 148-room Graduate by Hilton Cambridge hotel for an expected guide price of over £60 million ($81.44 million) to £65 million ($88.23 million). This is one of only two international properties owned by AJ Capital, which founded the Graduate brand in 2014 and sold it to Hilton in March 2024. The hotel on the River Cam was acquired in 2019 and renovated in 2021, and it is managed by Schulte Hospitality Group.

feed.title: EQT Analyst Rating: Stephens & Co. Raises Price Target to $71.00
feed.summary: Stephens & Co. has reiterated its "Overweight" rating for EQT, an independent natural gas production company, and increased its price target from $70.00 to $71.00. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the company shares amidst consistent analyst attention. EQT focuses its operations in the Marcellus and Utica shales, serving marketers, utilities, and industrial operators in the Appalachian Basin.

feed.title: David Yurman Sues TJX in Copyright Test Over Jewelry “Dupes”
feed.summary: David Yurman has filed a lawsuit against TJX Companies, alleging that the retailer is selling "virtually indistinguishable" jewelry that copies its federally registered cable designs. The luxury brand claims TJX is profiting from the "dupe economy" and knowingly imitates its copyrighted designs. This case could be a significant test of how copyright law can be used by luxury brands to combat the growing market for "dupes."

feed.title: AT&T (T) Network Powers Sezzle's New Mobile Plan Launch
feed.summary: Sezzle has launched Sezzle Mobile, an unlimited mobile phone plan starting at $29.99 monthly, which operates using AT&T's network infrastructure. While AT&T shows strong profitability and institutional ownership, the company's financial health presents a complex picture with significant leverage and potential financial distress signals. These factors, alongside high valuation metrics, suggest investors should exercise careful consideration.

feed.title: Progressive (PGR) Reports Increase in January Net Premiums Writt
feed.summary: Progressive (PGR) reported a significant increase in net premiums written to $6.74 billion and net premiums earned to $6.92 billion for January. The company projects a rise in GAAP EPS to $1.98, while pretax net realized gains on securities are expected to decline by 6%. Despite some insider selling, Progressive's financial health is strong with robust revenue growth, a healthy balance sheet, and attractive valuation metrics, suggesting a stable outlook for the leading auto insurer.

feed.title: Labcorp Hldgs (LH) Target Price Raised by Baird to $326 | LH Sto
feed.summary: Baird has raised its target price for Labcorp Holdings (LH) to $326 from $313, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating continued positive sentiment. This adjustment follows several other analysts who have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for Labcorp in recent months. Labcorp, one of the largest independent clinical laboratories in the U.S., offers a wide range of clinical lab tests.

feed.title: Baird Raises Price Target for CarMax (KMX) to $48 | KMX Stock Ne
feed.summary: Baird has reaffirmed its "Outperform" rating for CarMax (KMX) and increased the price target from $44 to $48, reflecting a positive outlook on the company's future performance. This adjustment follows several recent analyst ratings for CarMax, with both increases and decreases in price targets. CarMax, the largest used-vehicle retailer in the US, aims to expand its market share beyond the current estimated 3.7% of vehicles 0-10 years old.

feed.title: F5 and Scality expand partnership to deliver secure, high-performance data infrastructure for AI workloads
feed.summary: F5 and Scality have deepened their partnership to provide secure, high-performance data infrastructure tailored for AI workloads. This collaboration integrates F5's Application Delivery and Security Platform with Scality's S3-compatible object storage, enhancing data access, resilience, and security across various environments. The joint solution aims to address the demanding data requirements of enterprise AI by eliminating performance bottlenecks, ensuring scalability, and safeguarding sensitive data.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: ICE Chat Connects with Crypto Platform Kraken to Up Access
feed.summary: The NYSE daily pre-market update reports on equities being fractionally higher in extended trading. Key news includes Intercontinental Exchange's (ICE) ICE Chat integrating with crypto platform Kraken, Infleqtion's (INFQ) successful NYSE trading debut with a 14% rise, and Duke Energy (DUK) celebrating 100 consecutive years of dividend payouts.

feed.title: Fortinet (FTNT) Stock Slides as Analyst Downgrades on Valuation Concerns
feed.summary: Fortinet (FTNT) stock declined after Freedom Capital Markets downgraded it from Buy to Hold due to valuation concerns, despite the company reporting strong Q4 2025 results with significant product revenue and billings growth. While other analysts remain bullish and raised price targets, potential risks such as rising memory prices, currency volatility, and increased competition, along with a high P/E ratio, contributed to the downgrade.

feed.title: Carmax To Rally Around 14%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
feed.summary: This article compiles

feed.title: As Worker Safety Scrutiny Intensifies, Mesa Labs Reinforces Why Primary Standard Calibration Is the Only Line of Defense
feed.summary: Mesa Laboratories is emphasizing the critical role of primary standard calibration, specifically its DryCal product line, in ensuring worker safety amidst increasing regulatory scrutiny and a generational knowledge gap in industrial hygiene. The company highlights that unlike secondary standards, their primary standards provide direct, accurate measurements crucial for detecting hazardous exposures, a distinction recognized by OSHA which has standardized its field enforcement on Mesa's Defender series calibrators. Mesa Labs is also partnering with AIHA to educate professionals on flow calibration essentials and the importance of precise instrumentation.

feed.title: Verizon vs Johnson & Johnson: Which Dividend Hike Winner Is the Better Buy?
feed.summary: Verizon (VZ) and Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) recently increased their dividends, but offer different investment profiles. Verizon provides a higher current yield of 5.8% but carries substantial debt and has slower dividend growth. Johnson & Johnson has a lower 2.1% yield but boasts a much longer track record of dividend increases and stronger growth prospects due to its healthcare business.

feed.title: Mass Team With $682M Joins Raymond James
feed.summary: A Massachusetts-based team, Touchpoint Financial Advisor Group, managing $682 million in client assets, has joined Raymond James' independent advisor channel. This team, comprising six advisors and three support staff, previously worked at Commonwealth, which was acquired by LPL Financial. This move marks the second departure of a Commonwealth team to Raymond James this month, highlighting ongoing transitions following LPL's acquisition.

feed.title: Pre-market: ROK Rockwell Automation (NYSE) $388.47 Feb 18, 2026: AI software momentum
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation (ROK) opened pre-market at $388.47, down 1.50%, following a strong Q1 earnings beat ($2.75 EPS) but mixed technical signals. The company reiterated its FY26 guidance, and investor focus is on the growth of its software and AI-enabled digital twin offerings in the industrial sector, driving interest despite a premium valuation. Meyka AI gives ROK a B+ (BUY) rating, projecting a short-term upside to $430.61, but a potential downside to $356.31 over a year.

feed.title: BlackRock (BLK) Slid on Investors’ Concerns
feed.summary: The London Company Large Cap Strategy's Q4 2025 investor letter highlighted BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) as a bottom performer due to investor concerns about private market liquidity, return durability, and higher expenses, despite strong fundamentals. BlackRock's shares slid -4.89% over one month but were up 8.75% over the past twelve months. The strategy continues to view BlackRock as a long-term share gainer, appreciating its strong balance sheet and capital return.

feed.title: Unnatural Products announces licensing agreement with Novartis to develop macrocyclic peptide therapeutics
feed.summary: Unnatural Products has entered into a licensing agreement with Novartis to develop macrocyclic peptide therapeutics, including a deal worth up to $1.7 billion specifically for a cardiovascular program. This collaboration highlights Novartis's continued investment in new therapeutic areas and its focus on expanding its pipeline through strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Slowdown in Its Small Business POS Platform Weighed on Fiserv's (FISV) Shares
feed.summary: The London Company Large Cap Strategy disclosed that it sold its position in Fiserv, Inc. (FISV) after the company experienced a slowdown in its small business POS platform and weak Q3 results, leading to a steep guidance cut and management changes. The investment firm cited a loss of credibility and increased doubts about Fiserv's long-term growth outlook. Despite Fiserv not being on the list of 30 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds, the firm suggests that other AI stocks offer greater upside potential.

feed.title: This Masimo Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Wednesday
feed.summary: Top Wall Street analysts have changed their outlook on several companies, resulting in five downgrades for Wednesday. Masimo Corp (NASDAQ: MASI) was downgraded from Buy to Neutral by a BTIG analyst, while Toro Co (NYSE: TTC) was downgraded from Outperform to Market Perform by a Raymond James analyst. Other companies receiving downgrades include Genuine Parts Co (NYSE: GPC), AtriCure Inc (NASDAQ: ATRC), and Transocean LTD (NYSE: RIG).

feed.title: Waycross Partners LLC Acquires 25,000 Shares of Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Waycross Partners LLC increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 50%, purchasing an additional 25,000 shares to hold a total of 75,000 shares valued at approximately $3.87 million. Bank of America reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $0.98 and a 12.3% year-over-year revenue increase. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share, maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with a price target of $60.30.

feed.title: Syon Capital LLC Raises Holdings in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Syon Capital LLC increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 13.2% in the third quarter, holding 90,258 shares valued at $4.66 million. Bank of America reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS estimates and showing a 12.3% revenue increase year-over-year. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $60.30.
